title: DVC Bedrock GUI Addon
description: This project adds a GUI for bedrock that will allow users to use the Simple Voice Chat Discord Bridge with a GUI on Bedrock Edition via an inventory item that opens a menu.
body:
**⚠️ THIS PLUGIN/MOD IS CODED BY AI, EXPECT BUGS.**

This plugin makes [Simple Voice Chat Discord Bridge](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat-discord-bridge/versions?g=1.21.11&l=paper) much easier to use for Bedrock Edition users (especially console users) by adding an easy to use GUI/Menu that allows for Bedrock Edition users who are on a server with Geyser, Floodgate, and Simple Voicechat Discord Bridge (SVD) be able to use commands from the SVD plugin with a simple user-friendly menu. 

Both [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), [Simple Voice Chat Discord Bridge](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat-discord-bridge/versions?g=1.21.11&l=paper), [Geyser](https://geysermc.org/download/) and [Floodgate](https://geysermc.org/download/?project=floodgate) are needed for this plugin to work properly. 

_How to use_
 
Bedrock players can simply open the menu easily with an inventory item that they will spawn with (a nether star) to open the menu. Then a menu will pop up showing buttons for all the Simple Voice Chat Discord Bridge (dvc) commands.

 _Features_
- An easy to use menu for bedrock users to use [Simple Voice Chat Discord Bridge](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat-discord-bridge/versions?g=1.21.11&l=paper) easier (especially for console users) 

- Allows for Java players to use /voicechat from the [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) plugin on Bedrock users to easily invite them to a voicechat group. (Only works Java to Bedrock currently)

 _Commands_

/dvcui -- Opens the GUI to control Simple Voice Chat Discord Bridge (only works on bedrock)

/bvc invite -- Command for bedrock players to invite other players to their vc group
